content:
Francis

Realm: Ultra
Type: Assault
Birthday: ####
Gender: Female
Nous index: 37
Based on: Hound of Tindalos



Stats: 
Con: 115
Atk: 155
Def: 105
No Psyche Surge: 【12 Realm Mastery】 【9.6% Damage Amp】
Psyche Surge +12: 【36 Realm Mastery】【28.8% Damage Amp】

Talent:
【Hunt Across Time】: Whenever Poison is Triggered on an enemy on your turn from other sources that is not【Time-Rend Hounds】, Francis commands all【Time-Rend Hounds】to pursuit the enemy, each dealing damage equal to 20% of Francis's ATK and trigger 10% of total poison on the enemy. 


【Soulforge Aplitude】: Poison applied by all ally awakeners are increased by 10~30%. Francis's final damage against Ultra enemies is increased by 20~50%. 

Skills

Exalt 
【Agent of the Hounds】: Francis summons 2【Time-Rend Hounds】. Deal damage to all enemies equal to 240% of Francis's Atk, apply the same amount of poison and put a copy of【Chrono pursuit】with fleeting into your hand. 

Over-Exalt
【Eternal Hunt】: Summon 5【Time-Rend Hounds】instead.
